items.title: This artist is documenting Bengaluru’s mango season in the face of climate change and ecological loss
items.summary: Using ASCII typographic symbols and 3D scans, Shruti Nagaraj’s project Maavu maps the cycle of growth, consumption, and decay of mango varieties. The project was showcased in Sa...

items.title: US inflation rate eases to 3.5% as gasoline prices fall
